response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor and software craftsman with strong distributed systems knowledge, but he entirely lacks the executive leadership, team scaling, and specialized production multi-agent AI architecture experience required for this CTO role. While he has some recent exposure to AI tooling and past fintech experience, his background is strictly as a senior/staff engineer and does not align with the strategic, organizational, and advanced AI-native requirements of an executive at a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Over two decades of hands-on engineering experience, including high-throughput microservices and event-driven architectures.
Recent practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows.
Prior domain experience in financial technology and investment platforms from his time at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Zero demonstrated executive leadership or engineering management experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+.
Lacks experience architecting algorithmic working-capital management and real-time credit risk systems.
AI experience appears limited to tooling and frameworks rather than operating stateful, multi-agent systems in high-stakes production.
